note: Final calibrated result for jan_cold window. Envelope optimization (cLeakage, lambdaRf) was attempted on a 3-day sub-window but produced overfitted params that worsened 7-day MAE from 3.86°F to 6.97°F — the 3-day hot bias (+2.81°F) was a cold-start transient artifact, not real envelope physics. The dominant calibration was operational: correct tSpDay and pBlow moved sim heater runtime from 0% to 69.6% (real: 67.3%). Default GreenLight envelope params are a reasonable model of this greenhouse.

calibrated.note: Calibration = baseline; envelope params left at GreenLight defaults

warnings: Envelope optimization on 3-day window overfit to cold-start transient — drove cLeakage to 5.7x default, worsened 7-day MAE by 80%
Default envelope (cLeakage=3e-4, lambdaRf=0.021) validated as best available on 7-day window
RH MAE 31.7% is high — humidity physics not yet calibrated (expected at this stage)
